text: The first phase-15 smoke, head reading raw obs, returned direction BCE 4-12 — far worse than phase-14's 1.04 baseline; the sigmoid saturated against truth.

locator.quote: pre-activations into the thousands and the sigmoid saturated.

text: Root cause: the head saw raw vol features in [10²,10³]; kaiming-init weights times those magnitudes pushed pre-activations into the thousands and the sigmoid saturated.

locator.quote: or some equivalent input normalisation is mandatory.

text: Lesson: for any per-runner head fed raw obs, LayerNorm or some equivalent input normalisation is mandatory.

locator.quote: to [1.05, 1.12] — back to the phase-14 baseline, no longer

text: Prepending nn.LayerNorm(RUNNER_DIM) dropped BCE to [1.05, 1.12], back to the phase-14 baseline and no longer saturated.
